name: HRQ_RESPONSE_TYPES_VL
query: SELECT B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.RESPONSE_TYPE_ID, B.RESPONSE_TYPE_CODE, B.QUESTION_TYPE, L.NAME, B.USE_AS_DEFAULT, B.VIEW_ID, B.NUM_ROWS, B.QSTN_WIDTH_PCT, B.MODULE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRQ_RESPONSE_TYPES_B B, HRQ_RESPONSE_TYPES_TL L WHERE B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = L.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND B.RESPONSE_TYPE_ID = L.RESPONSE_TYPE_ID AND L.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
